# CustomDimensionReloadNewDimensionError Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

## Extends
- *Error*

Thrown after using the /reload command when trying to register a custom dimension that was not previously registered. New custom dimensions cannot be added during a reload.
